static_findings.title: Original script cannot run in a minimal environment without XGBoost
static_findings.implication: The dependency is imported unconditionally, so even lightweight feature or rule tests fail when xgboost is unavailable.

static_findings.title: Test set is used during model development and model selection
static_findings.implication: The training function repeatedly evaluates models on test.csv and then chooses the final model, making the final test metrics optimistic.

static_findings.title: Prediction API changes behavior when probabilities are requested
static_findings.evidence: if return_probability and _LOADED_NGRAM_MODEL is not None
static_findings.implication: predict_post(text) uses the saved base classifier, while predict_post(text, return_probability=True) combines in the n-gram model and can return a different label.

static_findings.title: Warnings are globally suppressed
static_findings.implication: Convergence warnings and data warnings are hidden, which matters because some models are configured with very low iteration limits.

static_findings.title: Reported Logistic Regression baseline is artificially weak
static_findings.implication: The baseline uses tiny max_iter, extreme regularization, and loose tolerance. This can make the ensemble comparison look stronger than it is.

static_findings.title: Baseline Random Forest and ensemble Random Forest are not comparable
static_findings.implication: The standalone RF is shallow and unbalanced, while the ensemble RF later uses 200 trees, deeper depth, and balanced class weights.

static_findings.title: N-gram ensemble is evaluated but not saved as final model
static_findings.implication: The report discusses a final/enhanced ensemble, but the saved classifier is the traditional ensemble; later probability calls silently mix n-grams back in.

static_findings.title: Hard-coded test.csv path limits reproducibility
static_findings.implication: The function cannot cleanly evaluate alternate splits or cross-validation folds without editing code or overwriting files.

static_findings.title: Unused imports suggest iterative code drift
static_findings.implication: This is not harmful by itself, but it supports a cleanup pass before presenting the project publicly.
